further_reading.title: Monitoring, Logging, and Debugging
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides the official Kubernetes entry point for gathering evidence and debugging applications or clusters.

further_reading.title: Troubleshooting Applications
further_reading.why_relevant: Covers common Kubernetes troubleshooting workflows that align with the module's evidence-first triage approach.

further_reading.title: kubectl debug Reference
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful follow-on reading for practitioners who want concrete debugging mechanisms after learning the triage structure.

notes: No inline citation candidates detected. The module is primarily procedural and pedagogical, and it avoids specific incidents, statistics, standards-by-name, versioned vendor behavior, pricing, and security-event claims that would require inline sourcing.
